## Privacy and Security Review

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated where appropriate.
- [ ] Existing relevant tests pass.
- [ ] macOS-specific behavior was validated in Xcode or clearly identified as pending.
- [ ] No secrets, private application data, personal paths, or sensitive signing material are included.
- [ ] No unrelated features or refactors are included.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where needed.
- [ ] `PROJECT_RULES.md` was followed.
